items.title: S01E01 - Baptism of Fire
items.summary: Father Duddleswell welcomes his new curate, the recently ordained Father Neil, with a teasing baptism of fire, which opens the young priest's eyes to the complex nature of his parish duties and responsibilities.

infolabels.title: Baptism of Fire
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell welcomes his new curate, the recently ordained Father Neil, with a teasing baptism of fire, which opens the young priest's eyes to the complex nature of his parish duties and responsibilities.

items.title: S01E02 - The Bells of St. Jude's
items.summary: Father Duddleswell plans to install a new church bell.

infolabels.title: The Bells of St. Jude's
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell plans to install a new church bell.

items.title: S01E03 - The Parish Bazaar
items.summary: Father Duddleswell refuses to make bad-weather plans for the annual bazaar.

infolabels.title: The Parish Bazaar
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell refuses to make bad-weather plans for the annual bazaar.

items.title: S01E04 - The Doomsday Chair
items.summary: Father Duddleswell decides to disprove the curse of a doomsday chair.

infolabels.title: The Doomsday Chair
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell decides to disprove the curse of a doomsday chair.

items.title: S01E05 - Father & Mother
items.summary: Father Duddleswell accidentally damages the hideous portrait of the founder of the local convent, uncovering a concealed French masterpiece.

infolabels.title: Father & Mother
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell accidentally damages the hideous portrait of the founder of the local convent, uncovering a concealed French masterpiece.

items.title: S01E06 - The Tennis Match
items.summary: Father Duddleswell enters a tennis match against the Anglican clergy.

infolabels.title: The Tennis Match
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell enters a tennis match against the Anglican clergy.

items.title: S01E07 - The Seal of Confession
items.summary: Father Neil tries to modernize with a P.A. system and soundproof confessionals.

infolabels.title: The Seal of Confession
infolabels.plot: Father Neil tries to modernize with a P.A. system and soundproof confessionals.

items.summary: Synopsis needed

items.summary: Synopsis needed.

infolabels.plot: Synopsis needed.

items.title: S02E03 - Fatal Lady
items.summary: Father Neil receives embarrassing attentions from Miss Davenport, which he must tolerate because she is a generous benefactor of the Parish.

infolabels.title: Fatal Lady
infolabels.plot: Father Neil receives embarrassing attentions from Miss Davenport, which he must tolerate because she is a generous benefactor of the Parish.

items.title: S02E04 - The Heart of a Curate
items.summary: A beautiful nurse helps Neil recover from an appendectomy.

infolabels.title: The Heart of a Curate
infolabels.plot: A beautiful nurse helps Neil recover from an appendectomy.

items.title: S02E05 - All at Sea
items.summary: Father Duddleswell tries to arrange a burial at sea.

infolabels.title: All at Sea
infolabels.plot: Father Duddleswell tries to arrange a burial at sea.

items.title: S02E06 - The Season of Goodwill
items.summary: Even at Christmas, Father Duddleswell can't keep out of trouble.

infolabels.title: The Season of Goodwill
infolabels.plot: Even at Christmas, Father Duddleswell can't keep out of trouble.

items.title: S02E07 - A Back to Front Wedding
items.summary: Exhausted from performing several marriages, Father Duddleswell takes Father Boyd to the pictures as a treat -- where they are paged to return to the parish to perform one more forgotten wedding. After placating the angry families and seeing the young couple off on their honeymoon, Father Duddleswell realizes that he performed the ceremony after 6 pm, and therefore the bridge and groom are not legally married.

infolabels.title: A Back to Front Wedding
infolabels.plot: Exhausted from performing several marriages, Father Duddleswell takes Father Boyd to the pictures as a treat -- where they are paged to return to the parish to perform one more forgotten wedding. After placating the angry families and seeing the young couple off on their honeymoon, Father Duddleswell realizes that he performed the ceremony after 6 pm, and therefore the bridge and groom are not legally married.

items.title: S03E01 - Things Are Not What They Seem
items.summary: Father Neil offers advice to a woman with marital problems and thereby provides a field day for gossips.

infolabels.title: Things Are Not What They Seem
infolabels.plot: Father Neil offers advice to a woman with marital problems and thereby provides a field day for gossips.

items.title: S03E02 - Women
items.summary: Synopsis needed.

infolabels.title: Women
infolabels.plot: Synopsis needed.

items.title: S03E03 - Beddings and Weddings
items.summary: Hoping to curb the decay in family values, Father Neil initiates family group counseling sessions which produce quite the opposite of the intended effect of bringing and keeping couples together.

infolabels.title: Beddings and Weddings
infolabels.plot: Hoping to curb the decay in family values, Father Neil initiates family group counseling sessions which produce quite the opposite of the intended effect of bringing and keeping couples together.

items.title: S03E04 - Fire & Brimstone
items.summary: A family deals with an irreverent grandfather.

infolabels.title: Fire & Brimstone
infolabels.plot: A family deals with an irreverent grandfather.

items.title: S03E05 - A Legend Comes to Stay
items.summary: When he was young, Father Duddleswell was curate to a legendary eccentric. Now, 40 years late, the old man has come to stay just when Father Duddleswell is incapacitated with lumbago, and manages to turn the parish upside down -- including locking Fr. Neil in the church with Mother Stephen.

infolabels.title: A Legend Comes to Stay
infolabels.plot: When he was young, Father Duddleswell was curate to a legendary eccentric. Now, 40 years late, the old man has come to stay just when Father Duddleswell is incapacitated with lumbago, and manages to turn the parish upside down -- including locking Fr. Neil in the church with Mother Stephen.

items.title: S03E06 - Porgy & Bess
items.summary: When Billy Buzzle sets up a pig-sty in his back yard to accommodate Porgy and Bess, two pigs he has received from a defaulting better, the resultant stench proves too much for Father Duddleswell, who desperately resorts to pig-napping, stealing Porgy by dead of night and taking him to a nearby farm. When Porgy subsequently dies, Billy takes Fr. Duddleswell to court, but the judge, while berating Fr. Duddleswell for his transparently dishonest testimony, rules in his favour. Then Bess appears to be succumbing to the same sickness, but Dr. Daley reassures everyone that she is only in labour...

infolabels.title: Porgy & Bess
infolabels.plot: When Billy Buzzle sets up a pig-sty in his back yard to accommodate Porgy and Bess, two pigs he has received from a defaulting better, the resultant stench proves too much for Father Duddleswell, who desperately resorts to pig-napping, stealing Porgy by dead of night and taking him to a nearby farm. When Porgy subsequently dies, Billy takes Fr. Duddleswell to court, but the judge, while berating Fr. Duddleswell for his transparently dishonest testimony, rules in his favour. Then Bess appears to be succumbing to the same sickness, but Dr. Daley reassures everyone that she is only in labour...

items.title: S03E07 - A Mixed-Up Marriage
items.summary: Mother Stephen demands an audience with Fr. Duddleswell over a serious problem: Christine Hammond, a war orphan brought up in the convent, has fallen in love with Isaac Rosen, the elder son of the local rabbi. When the priest and the rabbi meet, they immediately agree that the marriage is impossible; so the young couple decides to ask the Anglican vicar to marry them. When Mr. Pinkerton insists that they wait two weeks before making a decision, the couple come to see Fr. Boyd, who suggests a ""naughty"" plan: Christine and Isaac announce that they have already been married in the registry office. Both Fr. Duddleswell and Rabbi Rosen are overcome with joy and wish them happiness -- whereupon they confess they were only testing them to see who would treat them with greater kindness. Fr. Duddleswell invites Rabbi Rosen to dinner (which Mrs. Pring supplies from a local kosher caterer), and we learn that the wedding did indeed take place in the registry office, as Fr. Boyd leads a toast to th
